creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Sun Mar 24 16:03:16 2013
New Revision: 315135
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/315135

Log:
  - Update to 1.1.1
  
  PR:		177253
  Submitted by:	ports fury

Modified:
  head/misc/dejagnu/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/misc/dejagnu/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/misc/dejagnu/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/misc/dejagnu/Makefile	Sun Mar 24 16:01:10 2013	(r315134)
+++ head/misc/dejagnu/Makefile	Sun Mar 24 16:03:16 2013	(r315135)
@@ -1,12 +1,8 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	dejagnu
-# Date created:		12 October 1996
-# Whom:			markm
-#
+# Created by: markm
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	dejagnu
-PORTVERSION=	1.5
+PORTVERSION=	1.5.1
 CATEGORIES=	misc tcl tk
 MASTER_SITES=	GNU
 
@@ -14,16 +10,15 @@ MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Automated program/system tester
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv3
-LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/COPYING
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	expect:${PORTSDIR}/lang/expect
 RUN_DEPENDS=	expect:${PORTSDIR}/lang/expect
 
+USE_TCL=	yes
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
-USE_TCL=	83+
 
 MAN1=		runtest.1
-INFO=	${PORTNAME}
+INFO=		${PORTNAME}
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

==============================================================================
--- head/misc/dejagnu/distinfo	Sun Mar 24 16:01:10 2013	(r315134)
+++ head/misc/dejagnu/distinfo	Sun Mar 24 16:03:16 2013	(r315135)

+SHA256 (dejagnu-1.5.1.tar.gz) = 60e747d1a4c5c7f76bee649bb9641e66f9605548b2761435aca09f88094433d2
+SIZE (dejagnu-1.5.1.tar.gz) = 579277
